sentences.arabic: قَرَّرْتُ أَنَا وَأَصْدِقَائِي أَنْ نَقُومَ بِرِحْلَةٍ بِالسَّيَّارَةِ إِلَى الشَّمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Ja i prijatelji odlučili smo napraviti put automobilom prema sjeveru.
sentences.translationEn: My friends and I decided to take a road trip to the north.

sentences.translation: Ponijeli smo hranu i vodu i krenuli rano.
sentences.translationEn: We packed food and water and set off early.

sentences.arabic: تَوَقَّفْنَا فِي أَمَاكِنَ كَثِيرَةٍ لِنَأْخُذَ الصُّوَرَ وَنَسْتَرِيحَ.
sentences.translation: Zaustavljali smo se na mnogo mjesta da fotografiramo i odmorimo se.
sentences.translationEn: We stopped at many places to take photos and rest.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّرِيقُ طَوِيلًا لَكِنَّ الرِّحْلَةَ كَانَتْ مُمْتِعَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Put je bio dug, ali putovanje je bilo jako zabavno.
sentences.translationEn: The road was long but the journey was very enjoyable.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلْنَا إِلَى وِجْهَتِنَا مَسَاءً وَنَصَبْنَا الْخِيَامَ تَحْتَ النُّجُومِ.
sentences.translation: Stigli smo do odredišta navečer i postavili šatore pod zvijezdama.
sentences.translationEn: We reached our destination in the evening and pitched our tents under the stars.
